semantic.role: End-to-end (E2E) integration test for the ArchSpine CLI binary using Vitest, verifying CLI execution and rule violation detection in isolated git repositories.
responsibilities: Set up temporary directories for isolated test environments with fs.mkdtempSync.
Initialize bare git repositories and configure user identity for test scaffolding.
Write project configuration files (e.g., archspine.json) programmatically using fs.writeFileSync.
Execute the built CLI binary (dist/cli/index.js) via child_process.execFileSync or spawnSync.
Assert CLI output and exit codes against expected behavior using vitest expectations.
Clean up temporary directories implicitly after each test (via OS temp cleanup or vitest lifecycle hooks).
Simulate user input by preparing prompts module path (implied by promptsModulePath).
outOfScope: Unit testing of individual functions or modules inside the source code.
Direct file system interactions outside of temporary test directories.
Cross-platform compatibility testing (though the git intent mentions Windows platform tests, the code itself is platform-agnostic).
invariants: All test files must end with .test.ts or .spec.ts (assumed compliant based on file naming conventions).

changeIntent.architecturalIntent: Add E2E tests for CLI behavior and rule violation detection to ensure correctness of the command-line interface.
changeIntent.recentChangeIntent: test: add Windows platform tests, CHK-02, FIX-02, and real LLM E2E tests (incorporates platform and real LLM E2E coverage).

English.role: End-to-end (E2E) integration test for the ArchSpine CLI binary using Vitest, verifying CLI execution and rule violation detection in isolated git repositories.
responsibilities: Set up temporary directories for isolated test environments.
Initialize bare git repositories and configure user identity.
Write project configuration files programmatically.
Execute the built CLI binary via child_process.
Assert CLI output and exit codes against expectations.
Clean up temporary directories after each test.
Simulate user input via prompts module path.
outOfScope: Unit testing of individual functions or modules.
Direct file system interactions outside of temporary directories.
Cross-platform compatibility testing (though intended in broader scope).

Simplified Chinese.role: 基于Vitest的ArchSpine CLI端到端集成测试，在隔离的git仓库中验证CLI执行和规则违规检测。
responsibilities: 使用fs.mkdtempSync设置临时目录作为隔离的测试环境。
初始化裸git仓库并配置用户身份信息用于测试搭建。
通过fs.writeFileSync程序化地写入项目配置文件（如archspine.json）。
通过child_process.execFileSync或spawnSync执行构建后的CLI二进制文件。
使用vitest断言验证CLI输出和退出码是否符合预期行为。
在每次测试后清理临时目录。
通过prompts模块路径模拟用户输入。
outOfScope: 对源码中单个函数或模块的单元测试。
在临时测试目录之外直接操作文件系统。
跨平台兼容性测试（尽管整体测试意图包含，但该代码本身是平台无关的）。
